method: Each test runs twice against the same model: once with its instruction surface injected and once with system_prompt, skill_path, agent and extra_skill_paths stripped. Outcomes are paired per test and compared with an exact McNemar test.
finding: Loading the instruction surface never lost a paired test in either category: every discordant pair went to the instruction arm, 4 to 0. The effect is large on the dotfiles-specific workflow rules and small on the general core rules, which the model largely already follows. Neither reaches significance because 20 paired tests cannot, so the honest reading is a consistent positive direction with the sample too small to prove it; widening the paired set is the next step, not a stronger claim from this data.
